entity.summary: Singapore-based centralized exchange introduced on August 8, 2019 after the Bitholic brand transition, operated under a Bithumb trademark license, and reported closed in March 2022 after the license ended.
entity.notes: The relationship to Bitholic is documented in the launch event and notes but is not forced into predecessor_id while the frozen lineage review still classifies that edge as unresolved. Bithumb Singapore was independently operated from Bithumb Korea and BitGlobal. March 2022 is stored at month precision; no first-party final shutdown notice was recovered, so death_reason remains unknown.

events.title: Bithumb Singapore launched after the Bitholic brand transition
events.description: The Singapore exchange adopted the Bithumb Singapore identity on August 8, 2019 under a partnership and trademark arrangement with Bithumb.
events.notes: This records the successor brand launch without forcing a canonical predecessor edge during the frozen lineage-review phase.

events.title: Bithumb Singapore trademark license ended
events.description: Bithumb Korea terminated the non-exclusive trademark agreement that allowed the Singapore exchange to use the Bithumb name and branding.
events.notes: The license termination confirms that Bithumb Singapore was independently operated; it is not itself the final shutdown marker.

events.title: Bithumb Singapore ceased operations
events.description: Exchange-tracking services record Bithumb Singapore as having terminated operations during March 2022, after which no active trading pairs or volume remained.
events.notes: Month-level terminal marker. No first-party final shutdown notice was recovered, so the cause remains unknown.

evidence.title: Bitholic Now Bithumb Singapore
evidence.notes: Contemporaneous reporting documents the August 2019 introduction of the Bithumb Singapore identity after Bitholic.

evidence.title: Termination of Bithumb trademark agreements
evidence.notes: First-party notice identifies Bithumb Singapore as a separate trademark licensee and sets termination for July 30, 2021.

evidence.title: Bithumb Singapore Exchange Graveyard entry
evidence.notes: Exchange Graveyard records Bithumb Singapore as closed in March 2022 for business reasons.

evidence.title: Bithumb Singapore inactive market profile
evidence.notes: Current profile states that the exchange terminated services in March 2022 and has no active markets.
